name: Integration request (Tool / Provider)
about: Suggest a new AI provider, built-in tool, or MCP integration.
title: '[INTEGRATION] '
labels: enhancement, integration
assignees: ''

---

**What type of integration are you proposing?**
- [ ] AI Provider (e.g., Groq, Cohere)
- [ ] Built-in Tool (e.g., specific API client)
- [ ] MCP (Model Context Protocol) Integration
- [ ] Other

**Describe the integration**
A clear and concise description of the service, tool, or provider you'd like Toolpack SDK to support natively.

**Link to official API documentation**
Please provide a link to the official docs for the service so we can evaluate it.

**Example Use Case**
How would you use this integration in your AI agent? Provide a quick scenario or a code snippet of how you imagine the API would look.

**Are you willing to submit a pull request?**
- [ ] Yes! I'd love to contribute it.
- [ ] No, just suggesting it.
